# DVAI-Bridge

> One local OpenAI-compatible HTTP server, embedded in your Web, Node,
> iOS, Android, React Native, Flutter, .NET, or Capacitor app. Seven
> SDKs, nine backends, one HTTP surface. Zero cloud cost, zero install
> for your users. BSL 1.1 licensed; commercial licenses required in
> production.

Point any OpenAI-compatible client at `dvai.baseUrl` (or the equivalent
on each native SDK) and it talks to a local model. Library, not
product: imported into the host app, runs inside the app process, no
sidecar / Ollama / Docker. Auto-recovery on backend failure, port
fallback on HTTP collisions, MSW or real HTTP transport selected per
runtime.

## Guide

- [Introduction](https://docs.dvai-bridge.com/guide/introduction): What
  DVAI-Bridge is, the problem it solves, the seven supported SDKs, and
  the backend matrix.
- [Getting started](https://docs.dvai-bridge.com/guide/getting-started):
  Install, init, first chat completion in Web + Node + React.
- [Backends](https://docs.dvai-bridge.com/guide/backends): WebLLM,
  Transformers.js v4 (incl. declarative multimodal loader + custom
  pipeline factory), llama.cpp, MLX, MediaPipe, LiteRT, ONNX Runtime
  GenAI, ML.NET.
- [Transports](https://docs.dvai-bridge.com/guide/transports): MSW vs.
  HTTP vs. Capacitor — how the OpenAI surface is exposed per runtime.
- [Native LLM (Capacitor)](https://docs.dvai-bridge.com/guide/native-backend):
  Capacitor hybrid app integration.
- [Capacitor quickstart](https://docs.dvai-bridge.com/guide/quickstart-capacitor):
  Step-by-step Capacitor + llama.cpp boot.
- [iOS Native SDK](https://docs.dvai-bridge.com/guide/ios-native-sdk):
  Swift apps via the `DVAIBridge` package; backends, model loading,
  HTTP server lifecycle.
- [Android Native SDK](https://docs.dvai-bridge.com/guide/android-native-sdk):
  Kotlin apps via `co.deepvoiceai:dvai-bridge`.
- [React Native SDK](https://docs.dvai-bridge.com/guide/react-native-sdk):
  TurboModule on RN ≥ 0.77 (Bridgeless).
- [Flutter SDK](https://docs.dvai-bridge.com/guide/flutter-sdk): Dart
  via `dvai_bridge`, Pigeon-typed bindings.
- [.NET SDK](https://docs.dvai-bridge.com/guide/dotnet-sdk): MAUI,
  Avalonia, WinUI, console; the `DVAIBridge` NuGet family.
- [MLX backend](https://docs.dvai-bridge.com/guide/mlx-backend):
  Apple-Silicon Mac / iPhone / iPad optimised path.
- [Model distribution](https://docs.dvai-bridge.com/guide/model-distribution):
  Hosting + verifying GGUF / ONNX / .task / .tflite checkpoints.
- [Multimodal](https://docs.dvai-bridge.com/guide/multimodal): Text +
  image + audio models (Gemma 4, LLaVA, Whisper, etc.) via the
  declarative loader.
- [Tested models](https://docs.dvai-bridge.com/guide/tested-models):
  Per-backend list of validated checkpoints.
- [Auto-recovery & robustness](https://docs.dvai-bridge.com/guide/auto-recovery):
  Blank-chunk detection, timeout, bounded reload loop on fatal errors.
- [Distributed inference (v3.0+)](https://docs.dvai-bridge.com/guide/distributed-inference):
  Phone-to-laptop offload via mDNS or self-hosted rendezvous.
- [Self-hosting rendezvous (v3.0)](https://docs.dvai-bridge.com/guide/self-hosting-rendezvous):
  Cross-network pairing without a public service.
- [DVAI Hub (v3.1)](https://docs.dvai-bridge.com/guide/dvai-hub): The
  brand-neutral installable utility that packages the strong-peer side.
- [DVAI Hub — developer fork (v3.1)](https://docs.dvai-bridge.com/guide/dvai-hub-developer-fork):
  Self-build / private-distribute the Hub.
- [vs. other tools](https://docs.dvai-bridge.com/guide/comparison):
  How DVAI-Bridge maps onto Ollama, LM Studio, MLX, llama.cpp, WebLLM.

## License setup

- [Index](https://docs.dvai-bridge.com/guide/license/): Per-platform
  index. Pick yours.
- [Web](https://docs.dvai-bridge.com/guide/license/web): Drop
  `dvai-license.jwt` in `public/`; SDK fetches `/dvai-license.jwt`.
- [Node](https://docs.dvai-bridge.com/guide/license/node): Project-root
  `dvai-license.jwt` or `DVAI_LICENSE_PATH` env var.
- [iOS](https://docs.dvai-bridge.com/guide/license/ios): Bundle resource
  in the Xcode project; loaded via `Bundle.main`.
- [Android](https://docs.dvai-bridge.com/guide/license/android):
  `src/main/assets/dvai-license.jwt`.
- [.NET](https://docs.dvai-bridge.com/guide/license/dotnet): `.csproj`
  `<None>` content + MAUI asset for mobile.
- [Flutter](https://docs.dvai-bridge.com/guide/license/flutter): `assets/`
  + `pubspec.yaml` entry; `rootBundle` discovery.
- [React Native](https://docs.dvai-bridge.com/guide/license/react-native):
  iOS Resources + Android `assets/`.
- [Capacitor](https://docs.dvai-bridge.com/guide/license/capacitor):
  Webview `public/` folder; bundled by `cap sync`.

## AI agents

- [Vibe-coding with DVAI-Bridge](https://docs.dvai-bridge.com/guide/ai-agents):
  How to point Cursor / Claude Code / Copilot at the docs, plus a
  copy-pasteable system-prompt context block.
- [`llms-full.txt`](https://docs.dvai-bridge.com/llms-full.txt): Every
  doc concatenated for one-shot context loading.

## Reference

- [Core options](https://docs.dvai-bridge.com/reference/api): Every
  `DVAIConfig` field (JS/TS) with defaults.
- [React hooks](https://docs.dvai-bridge.com/reference/react):
  `DVAIProvider`, `useDVAI`, `useChatCompletion`.
- [Vanilla JS](https://docs.dvai-bridge.com/reference/vanilla): The
  framework-agnostic `VanillaDVAI` API.

## Examples (in-repo)

- [Examples index + matrix](https://docs.dvai-bridge.com/guide/examples):
  Build + run instructions for all 18 example apps.
- Source: [`examples/`](https://github.com/Westenets/dvai-bridge/tree/main/examples).

- [v2.4 → v3.0](https://docs.dvai-bridge.com/migration/v2.4-to-v3.0)
- [v2.3 → v2.4](https://docs.dvai-bridge.com/migration/v2.3-to-v2.4)
- [v2.2 → v2.3](https://docs.dvai-bridge.com/migration/v2.2-to-v2.3)
- [v2.1 → v2.2](https://docs.dvai-bridge.com/migration/v2.1-to-v2.2)
- [v2.0 → v2.1](https://docs.dvai-bridge.com/migration/v2.0-to-v2.1)
- [v1.6 → v2.0](https://docs.dvai-bridge.com/migration/v1.6-to-v2.0)
- [v1.5 → v1.6](https://docs.dvai-bridge.com/migration/v1.5-to-v1.6)
